new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes other than sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10, presented either in bottles with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or otherwise put up with an excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar measured at 20 °C, in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres. This is a semi-sparkling wine (pétillant/frizzante) in small containers as covered by CN code 2204 22 10.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three core discriminating criteria for CN 2204 22 10: (1) wine of fresh grapes that is NOT a sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10 (expressed via complement restriction on SparklingWine); (2) presentation either in bottles with mushroom stoppers OR with excess CO₂ pressure ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar at 20 °C (ExcessPressureQuality with decimalRange restrictions on excessPressureBar, and MushroomStopperPackaging via BFO part restriction on SmallContainer); (3) container volume ≤ 2 L (SmallContainer part restriction). A minor gap remains: the disjunction between the two permitted presentations (mushroom-stopper bottles OR pressure ≥ 1 bar < 3 bar) cannot be expressed as a strict OWL intersection without an owl:unionOf, which is not supported by the current restriction types in the tool. The mushroom-stopper presentation aspect is partially captured via MushroomStopperPackaging being a subclass of Packaging (which is used by SmallContainer), but an explicit restriction linking SemiSparklingWineSmallContainer_22042210 to MushroomStopperPackaging is not separately added here to avoid over-constraining the disjunction. Coverage is therefore 0.85.
